backend/main.mo: Main actor defining Restaurant, UserProfile, Cuisine (including #hybrid), VibeAttributes types, and a hardcoded Map of restaurants with detailed attributes including coordinates, vibe flags, and seasonal data.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldActor state (with text-based cuisine and flat boolean flags) to NewActor state (with variant-based cuisine including #hybrid and nested vibeAttributes structure).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: adding 'Hybrid' cuisine filter button to SearchBar.tsx and updating useRestaurantSearch.ts to filter restaurants by 'Hybrid' cuisine type.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities, noting that SearchBar.tsx includes 'Hybrid' option and useRestaurantSearch.ts filters by cuisine including 'hybrid'.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes using rustic Western Colorado theme with desert sand, canyon red, and sage brush tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta, title 'Mesa County Hidden Eats', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration with root Layout route and child routes for directory (/), restaurant detail (/restaurant/$name), profile (/profile), and passport (/passport).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with sticky header containing logo, authenticated navigation links (My Passport, My Progress), login/logout button, first-time user profile setup dialog, content outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.t: Displays a restaurant card with image, badges (hidden gem, distance, seasonal), location details, and a visited checkbox. Includes a claim business mailto link and uses Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantList.t: Renders a grid of RestaurantCard components with loading skeletons and empty state. Supports optional distance display and seasonal mode highlighting.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Provides search input, cuisine filter buttons, and vibe filter buttons (pet-friendly, riverfront trail, date-friendly, live music, dog-friendly, groups). Manages filter state through callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes and initializes access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching restaurants (all, by name, by cuisine), managing user profiles, and client-side localStorage tracking for visited status and ratings.
frontend/src/hooks/useRestaurantSearch.t: Filters restaurants by search query, cuisine, vibe attributes, and seasonal mode. Returns filtered results with loading and error states from useGetAllRestaurants.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a Western Colorado rustic color palette (desert sand, canyon red, sage brush) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx: Main directory page displaying searchable restaurant list with filters for cuisine, vibes, and seasonal options. Includes geolocation features ("Find Near Me", "Surprise Me") and "Feeling Lucky" random hidden gem navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PassportPage.tsx: Displays user's Mesa County dining passport showing visited restaurants progress with completion percentage. Requires authentication via Internet Identity to view and track visits.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page showing exploration progress statistics including visited restaurant count and completion percentage. Requires authentication to view personal dining journey metrics.
Restaurant detail page showing full information including location, contact, seasonal availability, and user-specific features (star rating, personal notes) for authenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/geolocation.ts: Geolocation utilities using browser Geolocation API to get user location, calculate distances between coordinates using Haversine formula, and filter restaurants by proximity radius.
frontend/src/utils/seasonal.ts: Seasonal utilities for formatting month ranges into readable strings, checking if restaurants are currently in season, and providing appropriate badge styling based on seasonal status.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH format, typography with Lato and Merriweather fonts, container settings, border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state document for 'Mesa County Hidden Eats', a mobile-first restaurant directory app with gamification features, vibe filtering, and Western Colorado aesthetic; includes architectural notes, known issues (Select.Item crash, placeholder images), and existing feature list.
